林逸接到了一通电话。
电话里，老妈恨不得顺着网线过来爬过来！
“儿啊，家门口多了个弃婴，你赶紧回来！”
“还和你小时候……挺像的。”
林逸：？？？
回到家。
看着襁褓里古灵精怪眨着眼睛的小家伙，林逸懵了。
“谁家的娃？这么可爱！”
“缺不缺德啊！！”
【叮！奶爸系统成功激活】
就在林逸手足无措时，系统激活成功。
检测到宿主林逸：
给女儿喂奶粉，奖励育儿资金1000000元。
给女儿换尿不湿，奖励豪华婴儿车一辆。
给女儿做足底按摩，奖励学区房一套。
带女儿沐浴阳光，奖励：身体素质强化
林逸：奶爸？真香！
可是……孩儿她娘，你到底是谁啊……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0addd9b5758c4999cb6d270d516beb2f","author":"扬子鳄饿","author_id":"","book_id":"7136535833481317407","book_name":"我一个富二代，宠妻宠娃很合理吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5708人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7136909818811548193","read_count":"5708","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"701497"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"366","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,神豪,奶爸,校花,单女主,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9e8582bbb3c30b14962295ecb89b6696~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779398532&x-signature=zqXkQNHmFyyYS4XVodH7GZ3xRQ8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110844155673","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.606994e+06"},"log_
